Off Calendar Dec-13-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Richard Gherman, Trustee for Ghrman 1987 Trust is present. Represented by Ryan Steele.
Attorney Karen Uchiyama appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jennifer Doty is present.
Attorney Richard Hurlburt representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Birkelund, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 505B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of DEC-17-2012 is vacated.

UD JURY TRIALS

Off Calendar Nov-30-2012 Continued To Dec-13-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 501
